case_title: TANYA BISHOP VS. GABRIEL GUCHO SR ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK:NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE ON SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-07-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. AS TO DEFENDANT GABRIEL GUCHO - RETURNED - NO KNOWN ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-07-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF TANYA BISHOP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GABRIEL GUCHO SENIOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GABRIEL GUCHO JR IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT/NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
